description.en: UnionPay is a major card network and payment scheme, operated by China UnionPay and supported globally via UnionPay International for card acceptance and cross-border payments.

merchant_eligibility_countries: China Middle East United Arab Emirates North America United States

content_features.title: Global UnionPay card acceptance
content_features.description: Enable acceptance of UnionPay cards for domestic and cross-border shoppers where your acquirer/PSP supports it.

content_features.title: Online and in-person payments
content_features.description: Support UnionPay payments in both ecommerce checkouts and in-person point-of-sale environments (subject to your acquirer).

content_features.title: Authorization performance (approval rates)
content_features.description: Optimize authorization outcomes by sending clean cardholder data and using the right entry mode (ecommerce vs POS).

content_features.title: Fraud and risk controls via your PSP/acquirer
content_features.description: Use your PSP/acquirer tools (3DS, risk checks, velocity controls) to reduce fraud on UnionPay transactions.

content_features.title: Disputes and chargebacks
content_features.description: UnionPay card disputes are typically handled through your acquirer/PSP with standard chargeback workflows.

content_features.title: Settlement currency flexibility
content_features.description: Choose settlement currencies supported by your PSP/acquirer to manage FX exposure for UnionPay volume.

content_features.title: Decline monitoring and optimization
content_features.description: Monitor declines by reason (issuer, format, risk) and iterate on data quality, routing, and retries where appropriate.

tip: Track UnionPay declines by reason code and ensure you send complete billing/cardholder data; missing data commonly increases issuer declines.

faq.question: Is UnionPay a PSP or an acquirer?
faq.answer: UnionPay is primarily a card network/payment scheme. You typically accept it through a PSP and/or acquiring bank that supports UnionPay processing.

faq.question: How do I add UnionPay to my checkout?
faq.answer: Enable UnionPay with your PSP/acquirer, then ensure your gateway configuration and routing include UnionPay for eligible cards and regions.

faq.question: Can I accept UnionPay online and in-store?
faq.answer: Often yes, depending on your PSP/acquirer and terminal setup. Online and POS support is commonly available where UnionPay is enabled.

faq.question: What can I do to improve UnionPay approval rates?
faq.answer: Send accurate cardholder/billing data, avoid overly aggressive risk rules, use the correct transaction type (ecommerce vs POS), and review issuer decline reasons with your PSP/acquirer.

faq.question: How are disputes handled for UnionPay transactions?
faq.answer: Disputes generally flow through your acquirer/PSP using chargeback processes. Keep proof of delivery/service and respond within your provider’s deadlines.

seo.seo_description: Accept UnionPay card payments via your PSP/acquirer. Learn coverage, channels, settlement options, and tips to reduce declines.
seo.keywords: UnionPay, China UnionPay, UnionPay International, card network, card payments, cross-border payments, chargebacks, payment acceptance
